title: salix × matritensis
intro: Salix × matritensis, also known as the Salicin Willow, is a hybrid plant of Salix salviifolia and Salix alba, native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects due to the presence of salicin, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Salix × matritensis include relief from pain and inflammation, as well as potential antimicrobial and antifungal properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its therapeutic properties.
